response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Spoken audio and lyrics closely match the provided reference JSON for '管制塔より'. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized lyrics for the song sections; manual transcription and translation were required for the post-performance talk segment (02:51 onwards). 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are tightly synchronized with vocal onset. Rapid speech in the talk segment was handled with aggressive truncation and logical phrase grouping. Prominent on-screen text during the animated MV transition was included.

subtitles.original: ラジオネーム 匿名希望
subtitles.english: Radio name: Anonymous

subtitles.original: 意気地無しなのでしょうか
subtitles.english: Am I just a coward?

subtitles.original: それともこの世界には
subtitles.english: Or is it that in this world,

subtitles.original: ぼくはお邪魔でしょうか
subtitles.english: I'm just a nuisance?

subtitles.original: だとしても綴るよ
subtitles.english: Even so, I'll write.

subtitles.original: みっともなく叫ぶよ
subtitles.english: I'll scream ungracefully.

subtitles.original: フラれたって好きだよ
subtitles.english: Even if I'm rejected, I love you.

subtitles.original: いいでしょ いいでしょ
subtitles.english: Is that okay? Is it?

subtitles.original: 楽しかったよね
subtitles.english: It was fun, wasn't it?

subtitles.original: 悔しかったよね
subtitles.english: It was frustrating, wasn't it?

subtitles.original: もう独り言は、嫌だ
subtitles.english: I don't want to talk to myself anymore.

subtitles.original: 「待たせちゃったかな」
subtitles.english: "Did I keep you waiting?"

subtitles.original: 「別に待ってないよ」
subtitles.english: "I wasn't waiting at all."

subtitles.original: 夢と呼んだそれもぼくだっただけ
subtitles.english: It was just me who called it a dream.

subtitles.original: もういいかい
subtitles.english: Are you ready?

subtitles.original: 応えてよ、笑ってよ、気付いてよ
subtitles.english: Answer me, smile at me, notice me.

subtitles.original: 此処に居るのにな、意地悪だな
subtitles.english: I'm right here, you're so mean.

subtitles.original: 誰にも届かない光を
subtitles.english: The light that reaches no one...

subtitles.original: ぼくだけは 光と呼び続ける
subtitles.english: Only I will keep calling it light.

subtitles.original: 真夜中 管制塔から
subtitles.english: In the middle of the night, from the control tower...

subtitles.original: あなたを明かしてやる
subtitles.english: I will illuminate you.

subtitles.original: 特報
subtitles.english: [Special Announcement]

subtitles.original: 歌 博衣こよ
subtitles.english: Vocals: Hakui Koyori

subtitles.original: 作詞・作曲 堀江晶太
subtitles.english: Lyrics/Composition: Shota Horie

subtitles.original: 新アニメーションMV
subtitles.english: New Animated Music Video

subtitles.original: 応えてよ、笑ってよ、気付いてよ
subtitles.english: Answer me, smile at me, notice me.

subtitles.original: 此処に居るのにな、意地悪だな
subtitles.english: I'm right here, you're so mean.

subtitles.original: 誰にも届かない光を
subtitles.english: The light that reaches no one...

subtitles.original: どうしたら、伝えられるのでしょう
subtitles.english: How can I convey it?

subtitles.original: どうしても、伝えたいよ
subtitles.english: No matter what, I want to convey it.

subtitles.original: ライブ終了直後 プレミア公開
subtitles.english: [Premiere right after the live ends]

subtitles.original: ということで、新曲のお披露目、フルアニメーションMV公開の告知、
subtitles.english: So, we've had the new song reveal, the animated MV announcement,

subtitles.original: 新3Dのお披露目、3個どどーんとまとめてやらせていただきましたー！イエーイ！
subtitles.english: and the new 3D reveal—all three at once! Yay!

subtitles.original: 情報量多かったけど、ついてこれてるかな？
subtitles.english: It was a lot of info, but are you all keeping up?

subtitles.original: はい、ちょっとね新3Dが可愛すぎて気になっちゃうと思うんですけど、
subtitles.english: Yes, I'm sure you're all distracted by how cute the new 3D is,

subtitles.original: まずはオリ曲の話からさせてください。
subtitles.english: but first, let me talk about the original song.

subtitles.original: お披露目させていただいたのは新曲『管制塔より』！
subtitles.english: The new song I revealed is "Kanseitou yori"!

subtitles.original: ついにあの堀江晶太さんに書き下ろしていただきました！
subtitles.english: It was finally written for me by none other than Shota Horie!

subtitles.original: みんな、どうだった？エモい？良かった？
subtitles.english: How was it, everyone? Was it emotional? Did you like it?

subtitles.original: はい、そしてですね今ちょっと映像も流して「すごい良い」って言ってくれててめっちゃ嬉しいんですけど、
subtitles.english: I'm so happy to see everyone saying "it's great" while the video was playing,

subtitles.original: このライブ終了直後にフルアニメーションMVがプレミア公開されます！
subtitles.english: but right after this live ends, the full animated MV will have its premiere!

subtitles.original: 多分もうマネちゃんがポチッとしてくれてると思います。
subtitles.english: I think my manager has probably already clicked the button.

subtitles.original: 世界観がめちゃくちゃこだわられている映像作品になっているので、
subtitles.english: The video is a work of art with a lot of attention to its world-building,

subtitles.original: 何回も見て聞いて、そしてちょっと世界観の考察とかしてみてください。
subtitles.english: so please watch and listen to it many times, and maybe try to analyze the setting a bit.

subtitles.original: ちょっと待って1個言い忘れました。
subtitles.english: Wait a second, I forgot one thing.

subtitles.original: さっきの曲『管制塔より』、24時にリリースもあります！よろしくお願いします。
subtitles.english: The song "Kanseitou yori" will also be released at midnight! Please check it out.

subtitles.original: え、そしてお待たせしました、新3D！
subtitles.english: And now, sorry for the wait—the new 3D!

subtitles.original: どう？可愛い？可愛い？可愛い？
subtitles.english: How is it? Cute? Cute? Is it cute?

subtitles.original: はい、もっとね話すことなく見せたいんだけど、
subtitles.english: Yes, I want to just show it off without talking,

subtitles.original: ももこママのいつものにすごい近くなったんじゃないかなと思います。
subtitles.english: but I think it's become very close to Momoko-mama's original design.

subtitles.original: この後のメン限ライブで撮影会もしまして、さらに細かく見せちゃうので、ぜひメン限ライブも来てください。
subtitles.english: I'll be doing a photo session in the members-only live later to show it in more detail, so please come!

subtitles.original: メン限ライブでは本編で歌えなかったあのゲームの、みんなが大好き曲、
subtitles.english: In the members-only live, I'll also sing that song from the game everyone loves,

subtitles.original: キンキンキンも歌うよ！お楽しみに。
subtitles.english: the "Kin Kin Kin" song that I couldn't sing in the main stream! Look forward to it.

subtitles.original: じゃあ1つだけ新3Dのめっちゃ変わったポイント教えちゃうと...
subtitles.english: Well then, let me tell you just one point that's changed a lot in the new 3D...

subtitles.original: ケモ耳が揺れます！うわー！可愛い！
subtitles.english: The animal ears move! Wow! So cute!
